article_id: 1. No person shall be held in slavery or servitude.

article_id: 1. The Governor-General may at any time prorogue or dissolve Parliament.
text_snippet: 2. Subject to the provisions of subsection (3) of this section Parliament, unless sooner dissolved, shall continue for five years from the date of the first sitting of the House after any dissolution
